title: Luminous Tides
prompt: Instrumental only. Create a cohesive 10-minute nocturnal focus piece for late-night studying and deep work: warm Rhodes chords, a soft analog bass pulse, distant tape texture, very restrained brushed percussion, spacious reverb, and no vocals. Shape it as one continuous journey, not a loop: 0:00–1:30 sparse arrival; 1:30–4:00 stable, gently hypnotic work groove; 4:00–6:30 introduce a subtle new harmonic color and a delicate secondary motif; 6:30–8:30 open the texture slightly with soft shimmer and a quiet bass variation; 8:30–10:00 ease back into a warm, unresolved release. Keep the dynamics low to medium, no abrupt drop, no dramatic build, no harsh highs, no busy hi-hats, no bright solo lead, and no trailer impacts.
